assertions.title: Transactions table

steps.action: Open app at 1280px viewport and inspect Transactions section
steps.expected: Recent trades table populated from /trades with Time/Type/Price/Amount/Address and live updates
steps.observed: Table headers render and section is visible, but only empty row shown: 'No recent transactions'.

steps.action: Inspect network traffic for trades endpoint
steps.expected: Successful /trades responses with trade rows available for render/update validation
steps.observed: Browser requested GET /trades?limit=10 and GET /trades?limit=50, but external verification attempts repeatedly returned 429 RATE_LIMITED, preventing populated-row/auto-update confirmation.

evidence.network: GET /trades?limit=10, GET /trades?limit=50 observed; follow-up curl checks to /trades returned 429 RATE_LIMITED

assertions.issues: Unable to validate non-empty recent-trades rendering and auto-update behavior due API rate limiting and lack of available trade payload during session.

steps.action: Scroll to Token Info section below transactions
steps.expected: Section shows truncated contract address with copy button and Aptos explorer link
steps.observed: Token Info section displayed with contract '0xCAFE', Copy button, and Explorer link.

steps.action: Inspect transactions row state when no trades are rendered
steps.expected: Graceful empty-state message instead of broken/invisible table
steps.observed: Table remains visible and shows 'No recent transactions' and 'Trades will appear here in real-time'.

evidence.network: GET /trades endpoint calls observed during page load

steps.expected: Single-column layout with simplified/hamburger navbar and scrollable access to all sections
steps.observed: Navbar collapses to 'Open menu' icon, content stacks vertically (chart -> stats -> swap -> transactions -> token info), and sections are reachable by scrolling.

evidence.network: Standard market/candles/depth/trades fetches continue on mobile viewport

steps.expected: Swap widget is full-width/easily accessible with mobile-friendly controls
steps.observed: Swap card spans mobile content width and remains reachable with scroll; primary CTA is prominent.

steps.action: Open token selector modal from mobile swap
steps.expected: Token selector opens as full-screen modal
steps.observed: Modal occupies full viewport (375x812) and includes search + token list.

steps.action: Check touch target sizes for key controls
steps.observed: Measured controls include Open menu 44x44, range buttons 44x44, swap/limit tabs 149x44, token buttons 110x44, and CTA 309x52.

evidence.network: No modal-specific API failure observed; local UI interactions succeeded

steps.observed: Two-column layout rendered: left content column and right swap widget column.

steps.expected: Responsive intermediate tablet layout without overlap/breakage
steps.observed: Layout remains stable in compact two-column/tablet form with no overlap.
Layout transitions to stacked single column with hamburger navbar and no broken sections.

frictions.description: The app polls market/trades endpoints aggressively during validation; /trades frequently returned RATE_LIMITED (429) during follow-up checks.
frictions.resolution: Wait-and-retry attempts (5s, 6s, 15s) still returned 429; continued with observable UI assertions and marked trade-population validation blocked.

blockers.description: Local API /trades endpoint was rate-limited (429 RATE_LIMITED) throughout post-check attempts, preventing confirmation of non-empty recent-trade rows and live row updates.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Closed browser session to reduce request load and retried curl after 5s/6s/15s delays; response remained 429.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions: 5 passed and 1 blocked (VAL-POLISH-001 blocked by persistent /trades API rate limiting).
